summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 23/11/2022
DCE iron ore futures declined by 0.41% today, the main contract closed 732.5. The traders' willingness to ship is less.The steel mills are purchase on demand. The overall trading sentiment of the market is less.
